content.en:
"Ye Heavenly Realm God, what are you doing in the Six Thousand Territory?"

Orin asked curiously.

"Nature is the mystery of seeking a higher realm!" Ye Tian said truthfully, and then asked rhetorically: "Oulin Realm God, what about you?"

"I'm participating in the assessment of the treasure refiner!"

Orin said.

Treasure Alchemist!

Ye Tian is not a novice who doesn't know anything now, he still knows about the treasure refiner, that is, he can refine the super dimensional secret treasure even if it is a treasure refiner.

Every treasure refiner has mastered many methods of refining super dimensional secret treasures, and Ye Tian is not strictly speaking a treasure refiner now.

He has only refined a few low-level super dimensional secret treasures, but the number of refining is too much, but no matter how many they are, they are still not considered treasure refiners, and entry-level treasure refiners need to refine more than ten kinds of super dimensional secret treasures.

There are many benefits to becoming a treasure refiner, such as the method of refining medium or even high super dimensional secret treasures, if you don't become a treasure refiner, it will be difficult to obtain this inheritance.

Even the Garan Chamber of Commerce, on the surface, only sells the refining method of low-level super-dimensional secret treasures, and the refining methods of super-dimensional secret treasures above the middle level will still not be sold.

Although Ye Tian knew about the treasure refiner, he didn't know how to divide the treasure refiner.

During his conversation with Ou Lin, he learned about the division of treasure alchemists.

Low, Medium, High, and Super Rank correspond to the level of the Super Treasure Treasure, and it is relatively easy for low, medium, and high alchemists to attain it, and the Super Treasure Alchemist is a big threshold, and countless treasure refiners cannot cross this threshold.

Of course.

On top of the super-level treasure refiners, there are also great treasure refiners, and the great treasure refiners can refine quasi-super-dimensional dao soldiers.

If you can refine a real super-dimensional Dao soldier, it will be above the Great Treasure Refiner, and you will be called a Supreme Treasure Refiner.

Ou Lin is currently only a mid-level treasure refiner, but he has the strength of a high-level treasure refiner, this time he is going to participate in the assessment, and once he passes the assessment, he will be certified as a high-level treasure refiner.

And.

Ye Tian also learned from Ou Lin that there was also a huge force in the 6000 Territory - the Treasure Alchemy Building, and the treasure alchemists in the many territories near the 6000 Territory had to enter the 6000 Territory if they wanted to become a high-level treasure refiner and a higher treasure refiner inheritance.

And the inheritance of high-level and above treasure alchemists is almost monopolized by forces such as the treasure refining building.

Therefore, the gods of the Orin Realm must come to the Six Thousand Realm.

Airplanes!!!!

A strong wave came, and the entire Exploration Dark Dragon shook for a moment.

"It's to explore the Dark Dragon's extradimensional barrier at the shuttle border!"

Ou Lin said.

It was the first time for Ye Tian to take such a treasure ship to shuttle through the boundary extradimensional barrier, and it felt completely different from using the Domain-Breaking Boundary Star Array to shuttle over.

Soon.

The Extradimensional Barrier of the Border shuttled through, and they entered another realm.

It didn't take long for the Exploration Dark Dragon to be attacked by a half-step extradimensional creature.

Thundered!!!!

After some slaughter, everything is calm and move on.

Along.

This Exploration Dark Dragon has passed through many dangerous places, and many half-step extradimensional creatures in the realm of transcendence have been killed, and this is just the danger encountered on the way back, if it is really an exploration mission, how dangerous it is.

Of course.

The more dangerous places the Dark Dragon explores, the more benefits there are.

This is also the reason why the half-step extradimensional realm on the Exploration Dark Dragon is so powerful, maybe one day when they encounter a great opportunity, one of them will immediately break through to the superdimensional realm!

Of course, if they encounter great danger, they will also fall.

In short, the benefits correspond to the dangers, and they are destined to join the expedition of the Garan Chamber of Commerce.

A relatively long period of time passed, and the Exploration of the Dark Dragon finally shuttled to the territory of the Six Thousand.

After coming here, the Exploration Dark Dragon followed a safe route back to the headquarters of the Garan Chamber of Commerce, and of course put Ye Tian and them down on the way.

"The next stop will be to the Extreme Yang Realm, the Extradimensional Realm of the Six Thousand Territory, and both of you will go down to the Extreme Yang Realm. "

A half-step extradimensional realm said.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian and Ou Lin responded one after another.

......

Polar Yang Realm.

In the midst of an ancient megacity.

Ye Tian and Ou Lin sat in an attic here, drinking tea and chatting.

Compared with Ye Tian, Ou Lin naturally knew more about the territory of the Six Thousand Numbers, and she had already prepared a strategy. []

"Ye Heavenly Realm God, where are you going next?"

Orin asked.

"I don't know, let's stay in the Extreme Yang Realm for the time being!" Ye Tian said slightly.

Ou Lin said regretfully: "Then we have separated, and the Treasure Refining Building is in another extradimensional realm in the Six Thousand Territory, the Treasure Refining Realm. "

"How many extradimensional realms are there in the Six Thousand Territory?"

Ye Tian asked.

"That's the number!" Orin held out a finger.

"Could it be a hundred?" Ye Tian was surprised.

After all, one is impossible, and ten words are inevitably a little less, so he guessed a hundred.

However, he still guessed wrong.

"No, it's more than a thousand!" Ou Lin said: "The territory of six thousand is very suitable for breeding extradimensional realms, and with the interference of some forces, there are naturally many extradimensional realms born. But even so, the Death Void in the Six Thousand Territory is extremely dangerous, beyond the ordinary realm, even if it is a half-step transcendent realm, if you don't take the safe route, you may be killed in an instant. It is said that there was once an alien extradimensional realm who relied on his strength to run rampant in the territory of 6000, but encountered danger and was killed on the spot. "

"Even the extradimensional realm has fallen?"

Ye Tian was taken aback.

"So, if you want to make it around the Six Thousand Territory, you can either take some of the Great Chamber of Commerce's treasure ships and walk along the safe route, or buy a safe route map to shuttle yourself. But it's better to take the treasure ship of a large chamber of commerce, such as the treasure ship of the Garan Chamber of Commerce, it is safer to follow them, but the cost is higher. "

Ou Lin introduced.

"Thank you Orin Realm God for reminding me. Ye Tian hurriedly said.

Soon after, the god of the Oulin Realm took a treasure ship flight from the Garan Chamber of Commerce to the Treasure Refining Realm and headed for the Treasure Refining Realm.

And he just came to the 6000 Realm, temporarily learning more about this Extreme Yang Realm, and by the way, learning more about the knowledge of the Peak Realm God and the Half-Step Transcendent Realm.

There are some knowledge that is forbidden in other territories, but not here.

So, he can easily buy this knowledge.

Garan Chamber of Commerce, Polar Yang Division.

Ye Tian came here and purchased the knowledge about the peak realm god and the half-step transcendent realm, he mainly wanted to know how many eternal realm spirits could be condensed at the peak realm god level, and whether he needed to continue to condense the eternal realm spirit.
